channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pentagon Reportedly Asks Detroit to Use More Car Factories as Arms Factories
item.description: Pete Hegseth has previously said he'd like the U.S. economy to be placed on a "war footing."

item.title: New leaders, new fund: Sequoia has raised $7B to expand its AI bets
item.description: The fundraise is the first major capital raise under Sequoia's new leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards of the 54-year-old firm.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 17, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 17, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: Hacks season 5 episode 2 has the most hilarious Handmaid's Tale cameo possible — and it'll make you think of spinoff The Testaments in an entirely different way
item.description: Yes, that is really who you think it is in Hacks season 5 episode 2 — and I'm never going to be able to watch The Testaments in the same way again.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 17, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 17, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 17, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1763 on April 17 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: When is The Pitt Season 3 coming out?
item.description: When can "The Pitt" fans expect to check back into the ED for Season 3?

item.title: I test coffee machines for a living and I can't recommend this De'Longhi model at half price highly enough
item.description: With a huge number of drink presets covering hot and cold, the De'Longhi Eletta Explore can be your personal at-home barista.
